commands.review_summary:
The PR adds per-agent outbound A2A allowlists under `agents.list[].tools.agentToAgent.allow`, routes session tools through structured A2A decisions/errors, updates config schema/help/docs/baselines, prunes deleted agent references, and adds regression coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a report of broken current behavior. Current-main source inspection shows only the global `tools.agentToAgent` policy surface, so the requested behavior is absent by design.
commands.review_followup: This is a new per-agent authorization/config feature overlapping broader open scoping work, so the next step is maintainer scope review and normal merge validation rather than an automated repair job.
